subject: Capsakid, a small round green plant-based Pokemon with a leafy cap and wide open mouth, posed among leafy branches with red pepper-like fruits
description: A small, round, green Pokemon creature stands in a cheerful or aggressive open-mouthed pose amid lush green foliage. The creature has a compact spherical body, short stubby limbs, a leaf-like protrusion atop its head, and a wide open mouth revealing a bright red interior. Branches with red pepper-like round fruits or flowers surround it against a light green-to-white background. The overall composition is bright and energetic, with a fresh natural setting dominated by greens and reds.
foreground: Capsakid creature, round green body, leafy cap, open mouth, short limbs
background: Lush green foliage, leafy branches with red round fruits
emotion: energetic or delighted; wide open mouth, round eyes, dynamic stance
